## Driver lock (v1.2 — B1)

- **lock_held_by:** (empty)
- **lock_acquired_at:** (empty)
- **lock_lease_seconds:** 1800

Driver entry protocol: read this section; if `lock_held_by` is non-empty AND `now() - lock_acquired_at < lock_lease_seconds`, **abort silently** (concurrent driver running). Else write own session id and `now()` to acquire. Refresh `lock_acquired_at` at start of every step. Clear both fields on graceful exit (DONE / RED / USER-EXIT).

## Wave 1 — Status truth (4-way parallel + re-prioritization gate) — v1.2
- [ ] 1.A subagent: Plan 2 status report → `week-3-plan-2-status.md`
- [ ] 1.B subagent: Plan 3 status report → `week-3-plan-3-status.md`
- [ ] 1.C subagent: Plan 4 status report → `week-3-plan-4-status.md`
- [ ] 1.D subagent: Plan 4B status report → `week-3-plan-4b-status.md`
- [ ] 1.E driver: merge reports into `status.md`
- [ ] 1.F driver: re-prioritization gate (v1.2 Seat 4 P2) — if any of Plans 3/4/4B is RED, halt with `wave-1-reprioritize-needed`; human owner decides
- [ ] 1.G driver: ship Wave 1 PR + auto-merge --delete-branch

## Wave 2 — Cascade (sentinel + canary + 4-cluster fan-out) — v1.2
- [ ] 2.0 driver: read Wave 0 memo + foundation RESX; pattern + cluster freeze; Cluster D split (D1=.NET, D2=TS deferred); branch + commit
- [ ] 2.A SENTINEL: cluster A blocks-finance-ish (accounting, tax-reporting, rent-collection, subscriptions) — full implement+review cycle solo; gates fan-out
- [ ] 2.canary driver: 2-agent canary dispatch (smallest two clusters); measure wall-clock; drop to sequential if serialized
- [ ] 2.B cluster: blocks-ops (assets, inspections, maintenance, scheduling) — dispatched after 2.A GREEN AND canary GREEN
- [ ] 2.C cluster: blocks-crm-ish (businesscases, forms, leases, tenant-admin, workflow, tasks) — dispatched after 2.A GREEN AND canary GREEN
- [ ] 2.D1 cluster: ui-core + ui-adapters-blazor — dispatched after 2.A GREEN AND canary GREEN
- [ ] 2.E cluster: apps/kitchen-sink — dispatched after 2.A GREEN AND canary GREEN

## Wave 3 — Quality gate (4 parallel reviewers + diff-shape + human spot-check + pre-merge SHA check) — v1.2
- [x-by-2.A] 3.A reviewer: cluster A — produced inside sentinel run as Task 2.A Step 4
- [ ] 3.B reviewer: cluster B (foundation-only derivation; independent check; MUST NOT read cluster A's review)
- [ ] 3.C reviewer: cluster C (may reference cluster A as DATA)
- [ ] 3.D1 reviewer: cluster D1 (may reference cluster A as DATA)
- [ ] 3.E reviewer: cluster E (may reference cluster A as DATA)
- [ ] 3.diff driver: automated diff-shape check across 5 cluster commits; out-of-scope file → halt
- [ ] 3.F driver: human spot-check — random cluster of {B,C,D1,E} sampled to user; await `user-spot-check-decision`
- [ ] 3.G driver: pre-merge SHA check (PR head matches tracker tip); open Wave-2 PR + auto-merge --delete-branch

## Wave 4 — Plan 5 entry conditions
- [ ] 4.1 driver: author `week-3-cascade-coverage-report.md` with per-package → per-cluster-report links
- [ ] 4.2 driver: refresh `status.md` with Plan 5 entry verdict
- [ ] 4.3 driver: ship Wave-4 PR + auto-merge --delete-branch; record actual per-package token cost in Knowledge Capture; mark tracker DONE
